text:
a~ The Buddha occupies the Nakshatra of the Ketu. The Buddha,
however. rules the Sib house from the Lagna and the Boddha occupies
the att~ house from the Chandra·lagna. The Buddha Is conjoined by the
Shan! which rules the 1211\ house also from the Lagna.
The Buddha. in the birth chart is normal we may condude.
The Buddha, in the Navamsa chart. is in Karka and the Buddha is in
the 6'h house from the lagna. The Buddha is in the 41t1 house from the
Chandra and the Buddha occupies the house owned by the Chandra.
The Buddha is the lord of Kanya, the 6th sign: it is therefore deemed
auspicious in the 6th house. The Buddha is fully aspected by the Guru
which is strong being in its own house and which is conjoined by an
exalted Shukra. The Shukra is a Yoga Kar'ka. If the Buddha owns the ffh
house from the Lagna it rules a Trine from the Lagna also. Again the ffh
house from the Lagna is being fully aspected by a strong Guru and an
exalted Sf'lukra.
